Query.SQL: SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) as "PY.RELEASEABLE_AMOUNT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE TRUNC(PY.RELEASE_DATE) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${param.coNumber} AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RETENTION_TYPE = 'AO/CAEO' AND PY.AMOUNT_CURRENCY = 'GBP'

SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) as "PY.NON_RELEASEABLE_AMOUNT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE (TRUNC(PY.RELEASE_DATE) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) OR TRUNC(PY.RELEASE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${param.coNumber} AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RETENTION_TYPE = 'AO/CAEO' AND PY.AMOUNT_CURRENCY = 'GBP'
